name: Alert
description: Inline callout for status, warning, or informational messages.

api.name: Alert
api.description: Inline callout for status, warning, or informational messages.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-alert density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the box padding shifts — text/icon size stay governed by Size.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Alert>
    <Heading Level="5" Size="sm" Weight="medium" Class="mb-1 leading-none tracking-tight">Heads up!</Heading>
    <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Leading="relaxed">You can add components to your app using the CLI.</Lumeo.Text>
</Alert>

examples.title: Destructive
examples.code:
<Alert Variant="Alert.AlertVariant.Destructive">
    <Heading Level="5" Size="sm" Weight="medium" Class="mb-1 leading-none tracking-tight">Error</Heading>
    <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Leading="relaxed">Your session has expired. Please log in again.</Lumeo.Text>
</Alert>

examples.title: With Icon
examples.code:
<Alert>
    <Flex Gap="3">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Info" class="h-4 w-4 mt-0.5" />
        <Stack Gap="0">
            <Heading Level="5" Size="sm" Weight="medium" Class="mb-1 leading-none tracking-tight">Information</Heading>
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Leading="relaxed">This action will update your preferences.</Lumeo.Text>
        </Stack>
    </Flex>
</Alert>
<Alert Variant="Alert.AlertVariant.Destructive">
    <Flex Gap="3">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.CircleAlert" class="h-4 w-4 mt-0.5" />
        <Stack Gap="0">
            <Heading Level="5" Size="sm" Weight="medium" Class="mb-1 leading-none tracking-tight">Something went wrong</Heading>
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Leading="relaxed">Could not save your changes. Please try again.</Lumeo.Text>
        </Stack>
    </Flex>
</Alert>

examples.title: With Action
examples.code:
<Alert>
    <Flex Align="start" Justify="between" Gap="4">
        <Flex Gap="3">
            <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Bell" class="h-4 w-4 mt-0.5 text-primary" />
            <Stack Gap="0">
                <Heading Level="5" Size="sm" Weight="medium" Class="mb-1 leading-none tracking-tight">New feature available</Heading>
                <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Leading="relaxed">Dark mode is now available for all users.</Lumeo.Text>
            </Stack>
        </Flex>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Try it</Button>
    </Flex>
</Alert>

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Alert

Inline callout for status, warning, or informational messages.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/alert

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Alert | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Alert | Variant | `AlertVariant` | `AlertVariant.Default` |  |
| Alert | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| Alert | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-alert density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the box padding shifts — text/icon size stay governed by Size. |
| Alert | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Alert | IsDismissible | `bool` | `` |  |
| Alert | OnDismiss | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Alert | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| Alert | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| Alert | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| Alert | ShowIcon | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Alert | AutoDismissMs | `int?` | `` |  |
| Alert | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Alert | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Alert) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (Alert) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

## Events
- `OnDismiss` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Alert />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Alert/Alert.razor`
